notes: Runs perfectly out of the box without any detectable video/audio glitches.
title: Eternal Card Game

notes: I have run into a few crashes; sometimes in game, sometimes at startup. They  happen so rarely that it's barely an issue and so far I've always made it back to the game in time. Apart from that it runs perfectly.
title: Eternal Card Game

notes: Works properly once that "PROTON_NO_D3D11=1 %command%" is set in Launch Options. Without it it crashes during loading of Unity. I have managed to connect to my Eternal account and tested Account, Collection and Puzzles so far.
title: Eternal Card Game

notes:
Works properly once that "PROTON_NO_D3D11=1 %command%" is set in Launch Options. Without it it crashes during loading of Unity. I have managed to connect to my Eternal account and tested all parts but Event now, both PvE and PvP.

The only issue I have found is a rectangle with constant stream of flickering messages like "Connecting to Steam" which is shown in the bottom of the right black stripe. But it does not cover any game area there and it only appears if there are those black side stripes (fullscreen while using a resolution with other ratio than your monitor).
title: Eternal Card Game

notes: Works perfectly out of the box
title: Eternal Card Game

notes: Everything appears to work perfectly, set up an account, played fullscreen and windowed.
title: Eternal Card Game

notes: Crashes during loading of Unity without "PROTON_NO_D3D11=1 %command%" set in Launch Options, with it runs properly. All gameplay parts work perfectly but after 60+ hours I am lowering rating from Gold to Silver because the first two issues are really getting on my nerves: 1) Half of the time I need to kill it via Manager, it gets stuck while closing. 2) It is prone to random overheating on my setup. Runs OK for few hours at 60°C and then suddenly attacks 90°C within half a minute. 3) And there is also a rectangle with constant stream of flickering messages like "Connecting to Steam" which is shown in the bottom of the right black stripe. But it does not cover any game area there and it only appears if there are those black side stripes (fullscreen while using a resolution with other ratio than your monitor) so I don't mind.
title: Eternal Card Game
